hotes.hotel_address: Long Beach , Coastal Road, Belle Mare, Mauritius
hotes.remarks:
CONFIDENTIAL DMC PARITY RATES - CURRENCY: USD ($)
RATES INCLUDE SERVICE AND GOVERNMENT TAXES / RATES ARE SUBJECT TO CHANGE IN CASE OF A GOVERNMENT TAX INCREASE
AS FROM 01.11.26: SAME RATES APPLY AS PER ON THIS CONTRACT (SAME PERIODS & CONTRACTED OFFERS) - APPLICABLE UNTIL ISSUE OF THE NEW CONTRACT
HOTEL CATEGORY: 5-Star Superior
1. Rates are based on 1/2 Double or Single Adult occupancy EXCEPT the Family Suite and Long Beach Suite.
2. All stays including the night of the 31.12.25 & 31.12.26 have to be a minimum of 5 consecutive nights
3. Check-in: 14h - Check-out: 12h / Early Check-in (7am) or Late Check-out (8pm) : 50% on confirmed room rate on same meal plan booked, including contracted and 
special offers where applicable. Except on 31/12 which is at 100% (all details in contract).
4. When a single parent shares the room with 1 child or 1 teen, the Single adult rate should be applied and Child/Teen supplement as per their respective age and Meal Plan 
(FOC where applicable)
5. Maximum of 2 children free of charge for all Room categories.
OCCUPANCIES: ALL RESERVATIONS MUST RESPECT OUR MAXIMUM OCCUPANCIES AS MENTIONED BELOW
ALL JUNIOR SUITES: 3 ADULTS or 2 ADULTS & 2 TEENS (or 2 CHILDREN)
FAMILY SUITE: 2 ADULTS & 3 CHILDREN or 2 ADULTS & 2 TEENS
LONG BEACH SUITE: 2 ADULTS & 2 CHILDREN/TEENS.
hotes.cancellation_policy:
Peak Season – no cancellation fees are payable by the Tour Operator 
(or a full refund of the Reservation Amount will be applicable if 
payment has been effected by the Tour Operator) provided written 
notice of cancellation is received by Sunlife not less than 45 (forty 
five) days prior to Guest(s) check in date as per the Reservation. 
Where written notice of cancellation is less than 45 (forty five) days 
of Guest check in date (or a no show by the Guest(s) or an early 
departure or an amendment to the Reservation), a cancellation fee 
calculated at 100% (hundred percent) of the Reservation Amount 
shall be payable by the Tour Operator to Sunlife, (no refund will be 
applicable if payment of the Reservation Amount has been effected);High, Shoulder High, Shoulder Low, Shoulder, Low Seasons – no 
cancellation fees are payable by the Tour Operator (or a full 
refund of the Reservation Amount will be applicable if payment 
has been effected by the Tour Operator) provided written notice 
of cancellation is received by Sunlife not less than 30 (thirty) days 
prior to Guest(s) check in date as per the Reservation. Where written 
notice of Cancellation is less than 30 (thirty) days but more than 
7 days of Guest check in date as per the Reservation, a cancellation 
fee calculated at 50% (fifty percent) of the Reservation Amount shall 
be payable by the Tour Operator to Sunlife (or a refund equivalent to 
50% of the Reservation Amount will be given by Sunlife if payment has 
been effected). Where written notice of cancellation 7 days or less of 
Guest(s) check in date as per the Reservation (or a no show by the 
Guest(s) or an early departure or an amendment to the Reservation), 
a cancellation fee calculated at 100% (hundred percent) of the 
Reservation Amount shall be payable by the Tour Operator to Sunlife
(no refund will be applicable if payment of the Reservation Amount 
has been effected).
hotes.offers:
FAMILY OFFER
20% discount on extra room for Child and/or teen up to 17 years old.
DETAILS & CONDITIONS:
• Applicable to all room types
• Extra bed policy apply for 3rd Child/Teen and 4th Child
• This discount is applicable on Meal plan supplement
• This discount is not combinable with any other special offer
• Validity: 01.11.25 - 31.10.26

LONG STAY OFFER
20% discount for stays of minimum 21 nights or more.
• This discount is not combinable with any other special offer
• This discount is applicable on Meal plan supplement
• Validity: 01.11.25 - 31.10.26

REPEATERS OFFER
10% discount as from second stay onwards in any Sunlife resort. (Not combinable with any other offer).
Or a free room upgrade to next room category (Junior Suite to Junior Suite Premium and Junior Suite Premium to Junior Suite Beach-Front), whenever a tactical offer is more than 10% (in this case it is combinable with Tactical offer)
• This discount is applicable on Meal plan supplement
• Validity: 01.11.25 - 31.10.2

HONEYMOON / WEDDING ANNIVERSARY OR ANY OFFICIAL CIVIL PARTNERSHIP SPECIAL OFFER
• Turndown with gifts in room on day of arrival
• Signature 3-course dinner once during stay
• For all stays of minimum 7 nights, Come Alive expericence "SWING & DRIFT" for 20 minutes is offered for the couple, once per stay. To be taken between 14hr - 16rs, booked upon check in
• Join us and our mixologist for a weekly get together and savor our cocktails designed with medicinal healing properties.
ADD ONS: 
• 15% discount upon booking the exclusive private dinner at the Beach Gazebo 
• 20% discount upon booking a couple massage between 10h - 15h 
• 15% discount for a personalized photoshoot with 30 digital photos.
DETAILS & CONDITIONS:
• Applicable to all room types
• This special offer is combinable with tactical offer
• Minimum of 4 consecutive nights stay required
• HONEYMOON: A wedding/Civil partnership certificate not exceeding 18 months from date of issue at time of travel must be presented upon booking/check in. Failure to produce such document will encompass guests to pay prevailing Public Rates on day of check in
• For WEDDING ANNIVERSARIES, Offer is applicable as from 3rd, 5th, 10th and multiple of 5 wedding anniversary. (wedding/Civil Partnership certificate required)
• “HONEYMOON / WEDDING ANNIVERSARY SPECIAL OFFER” must be specified on booking confirmation in order for offer to be applied
Validity: 01.11.25 - 31.10.26

WEDDING OFFER “YOUR WEDDING OUR GIFT”
• Free of charge inclusions for the wedding couple only:
 - Dedicated Celebration specialist throughout the wedding ceremony. Witnesses upon request
 - Beautiful location with ceremony set-up and a local garden flower arch 
 - Symbolic wedding cake and Sparkling wine for couple
 - Background music during the ceremony
 - A romantic 3-course dinner, turndown services on wedding night and the following morning, breakfast in room
• Receive your Gift at turndown on your Wedding day 
• Guaranteed complimentary room upgrade to next Room type (Junior Suite to Junior Suite Premium and Junior Suite Premium to Junior Suite Beach-Front) during Low Season for Wedding couple only.
ADD ONS: 
• 15% discount upon booking the exclusive private dinner at the Beach Gazebo 
• 25% discount upon booking a couple massage between 10h - 15h.
DETAILS & CONDITIONS:
• Applicable to all room types
• Minimum of 5 consecutive nights stay required
• This special offer is combinable with tactical offer
• Applicable for legal weddings only. Legal fees are not included and are with supplement
• Applicable also to Symbolic/mock wedding upon presentation of a legal wedding certificate not exceeding 18 months
• Renewal of Vows package also available with supplement when no legal wedding certificate are provided (Sunlife wedding Factsheet)
• For the “Your Wedding Our Gift” package, various wedding package options and formalities, please refer to the Sunlife Wedding Fact Sheet.
Validity: 01.11.25 - 31.10.26.

GOLF OFFER
COMPLIMENTARY AND UNLIMITED GREEN FEES
• Complimentary and unlimited Green Fees at Ile aux Cerfs Golf Club and Anahita Golf Club
• Complimentary return land shuttle and boat transfer from Pointe Maurice jetty to Ile aux Cerfs Golf Club at pre-scheduled time, provided by the Hotel at Check in.
• Complimentary return land shuttle for Anahita Golf Club at pre-scheduled time, provided by the Hotel at Check in.
• Departure and return times to be confirmed with the hotel Concierge
• Advance tee-times bookings are recommended for our guests. Bookings to be done through Sunlife CRO: reservations.tradepartners@yoursunlife.com
• Golf cart and Pull Trolley (depending on stay period ) at Anahita and Ile aux Cerfs golf clubs with supplement (Refer to Golf Sales kit)
ALL INCLUSIVE MEAL PLAN:
• Golfers on All Inclusive basis will be able to enjoy a 2-course light menu lunch including soft drink at Ile aux Cerfs club-house
SUNRISE TO SUNSET GOLF OFFER:
• Stay a minimum of 7 nights and combine the stay between Long Beach and Sugar Beach with inclusive interhotel transfer
• This special offer is combinable with tactical offer
• A special breakfast at Long Beach and dinner at Sugar Beach, once during the stay.
• Possibility for playing on 3 Golf Courses including Tamarina Golf Club, Ile aux Cerfs Golf Club and Anahita Golf Club
GOLF PRO STAY:
• On Shoulder Low, Shoulder, Shoulder high and High Seasons - Golf groups consisting of minimum 7 pax are entitled to 1 Pro in a single room on complimentary 
basis on same meal plan as the group. Supplement for accompanying Pro partner sharing the room applies if any at TO net rates above.
• On Low Season - Golf groups consisting of minimum 5 pax are entitled to 1 Pro in a single room on complimentary basis on same meal plan as the group. 
Supplement for accompanying Pro partner sharing the room applies if any at TO net rates above
• For Bookings and queries, please contact reservations.tradepartners@yoursunlife.com
hotes.group_policy:
GROUP TRANSFERS:
• Free land shuttles to Pointe Maurice jetty and Anahita Golf Club, are applicable, for groups up to 30 pax on one golf course per day. A supplement applies 
for Groups of more than 30 pax
Validity: 01.11.25 - 31.10.26

hotel_rooms.extra_bed_policy:
1. When a single parent shares the room with 1 child or 1 teen, the Single adult rate should be applied and Child/Teen supplement as per their respective age and Meal Plan 
(FOC where applicable)
2. Maximum of 2 children free of charge for all Room categories

CHILDREN/TEENS SHARING & ADULT SHARING is Per RATES/NIGHT/PERSON on (High season , Shoulder season, Peak season, Shoulder low , Shoulder High season and also Low season) .
1st Child: 0 to 11 years = Free Of Charge 
2nd Child: 0 to 11 years = Free Of Charge 
1st Teen: 12 to 17 years = 73 USD
2nd Teen: 12 to 17 years = 73 USD
